mapper.select: SELECT comment_no, board_no, user_no, comment_content, comment_created_date FROM comment WHERE board_no=#{boardNo}

SELECT b.board_no, b.board_title, b.board_created_date, b.board_count, b.board_tag, u.user_no, u.user_nickname, COALESCE(fv.favor_count, 0) AS favor_count, COALESCE(bl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM board b INNER JOIN user u ON b.user_no = u.user_no LEFT JOIN favor_count_view fv ON b.board_no = fv.board_no LEFT JOIN boardlike_count_view bl ON b.board_no = bl.board_no WHERE b.boardtype_no = 3 ORDER BY b.board_no ASC LIMIT #{rowNo}, #{length}
mapper.insert: insert into board( boardtype_no, board_title, user_no, trip_no, board_content, board_tag) values ( 3, #{boardTitle}, 2, 2, #{boardContent}, #{boardTag})
mapper.select: select b.board_no, b.boardtype_no, b.board_title, b.board_count, b.board_created_date, b.trip_no, b.board_content, b.board_tag, u.user_photo, u.user_nickname, c.user_no, c.comment_no, c.comment_content, c.comment_created_date from board b inner join user u on b.user_no=u.user_no left outer join comment c on c.board_no=b.board_no where b.board_no=#{boardNo}
mapper.update: update board set board_count=#{boardCount}+1 where board_no=#{boardNo}
update board set board_title=#{boardTitle}, board_content=#{boardContent} where board_no=#{boardNo}
mapper.select: SELECT b.board_no, b.board_title, b.board_created_date, b.board_count, b.board_tag, u.user_no, u.user_nickname, COALESCE(fv.favor_count, 0) AS favor_count, COALESCE(bl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM board b INNER JOIN user u ON b.user_no = u.user_no LEFT JOIN favor_count_view fv ON b.board_no = fv.board_no LEFT JOIN boardlike_count_view bl ON b.board_no = bl.board_no WHERE b.boardtype_no = 3 ORDER BY like_count DESC, b.board_no ASC LIMIT #{rowNo}, #{length}

SELECT b.board_no, b.board_title, b.board_created_date, b.board_count, b.board_tag, u.user_no, u.user_nickname, COALESCE(fv.favor_count, 0) AS favor_count, COALESCE(bl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM board b INNER JOIN user u ON b.user_no = u.user_no LEFT JOIN favor_count_view fv ON b.board_no = fv.board_no LEFT JOIN boardlike_count_view bl ON b.board_no = bl.board_no WHERE b.boardtype_no = 3 ORDER BY favor_count DESC, b.board_no ASC LIMIT #{rowNo}, #{length}

SELECT b.board_no, b.board_title, b.board_created_date, b.board_count, b.board_tag, u.user_no, u.user_nickname, COALESCE(fv.favor_count, 0) AS favor_count, COALESCE(bl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM board b INNER JOIN user u ON b.user_no = u.user_no LEFT JOIN favor_count_view fv ON b.board_no = fv.board_no LEFT JOIN boardlike_count_view bl ON b.board_no = bl.board_no WHERE b.boardtype_no = 3 ORDER BY b.board_count DESC, b.board_no ASC LIMIT #{rowNo}, #{length}
